Portfolio

I’m Shane Moloney — Full Stack Engineer and Founder focused on building reliable systems with Rust and modern web technologies.

Click any project below for more details.

Projects

### FestivalGrade – Festival Rating Website **Angular + PostgreSQL** | March 2025 – May 2025 Fullstack festival rating platform with user reviews, Keycloak authentication, and content management features.
Technical details - Angular frontend with PostgreSQL backend - Secure authentication using Keycloak - Content management for festivals and reviews - Deployed on Hetzner VPS
### AI Detector – Open Source AI Email Detector **Rust** | May 2025 – June 2025 Open-source email classification tool using machine learning techniques.
Technical details - KNN detection engine implemented in Rust - REST API backend - Server-side frontend built with Rust Hypertext - Containerized with Docker - Deployed on Hetzner Linux infrastructure
### Technical Content Creation **YouTube – @shanemoloney** | May 2021 – June 2026 Created coding tutorials and technical guides on modern technologies with **10,000+ views**. Hosted live events with renowned developers such as Herbert Wolverson.
Topics & highlights - Rust, systems programming, and backend development - Practical tutorials and deep technical guides - Live coding sessions and community events
### TommyWhelan.com Website **Freelance** | January 2025 – March 2025 Responsive website for archival audio content.
Technical details - Deployed with Cloudflare hosting - Digitisation and publishing of archival audio content for public access - Fully responsive design
